findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'history of hydrilla at lake tillery' (3x).

findings.description: The AWCP Website link on the Additional Resources page has descriptive hyperlink text in the PDF but is rendered as plain unlinked text in the HTML, losing the href.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 11 lists 'AWCP Website (Aquatic Weed Control Program | NC DEQ)' as a hyperlink. HTML renders it as: '
  • AWCP Website (Aquatic Weed Control Program | NC DEQ)
    • ' with no wrapping the descriptive text.
